Validations.slugFormat: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
Validations.usernameFormat: Username can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, and dots
Validations.nameMin: Name must be at least {count} characters

HomePage.heroSubtitle: Leagues and tournaments for competitive games.

games.title: Communities
games.description: Join the community, follow the leaderboards, and leave your mark.
games.cardFallbackDescription: Open the game page to inspect current leagues.
games.noGamesDescription: Add games to the database or reconnect the current database to load the list here.

GamesPage.title: Communities
GamesPage.description: Choose a game to view its leagues, performance history and ladders.
GamesPage.cardFallbackDescription: Open the game page to inspect current leagues.
GamesPage.noGamesDescription: Add games to the database or reconnect the current database to load the list here.
GamesPage.noGamesFound: No games found for this search
GamesPage.noGamesFoundDescription: Try searching for another game title or check for typos.

ProfilePage.noGames: You haven't been part of any competition yet
ProfilePage.noGamesOther: This user hasn't been part of any competition yet
ProfilePage.noGamesDescription: Join a game to appear in its leagues.
ProfilePage.noGamesDescriptionOther: This user is not participating in any game leagues.

GamePage.dbUnavailableDescription: Start your Postgres instance or update `.env` with a reachable connection string to view this game page.
GamePage.eventsDescription: Track and participate in competitive leagues and tournaments for {gameName}.
GamePage.noPlayers: This league doesn't have players yet.
GamePage.noEvents: No events created for this game.
GamePage.noEventsDescription: Once events are entered, this page will list leagues and tournaments.
GamePage.sidebarDescription: Track player leagues and performance for this game.
GamePage.leagueInfoDescription: This league is calculated based on points. The results are frequently updated by game administrators.
GamePage.pendingNotice: Game is pending and needs approval

Errors.title: Login failed
Errors.callback: We couldn't finish the Discord sign-in flow. Please try again.
Errors.generic: We couldn't sign you in right now. Please try again.

EditProfile.title: Edit Profile
EditProfile.description: Update your personal information and biography.

username.label: Profile Link
username.taken: This profile link is already taken.

name.label: Display Name
name.placeholder: Enter how you want to be called
name.taken: This display name is already taken.

bio.label: Bio
bio.placeholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...

color.label: Profile Color
color.description: This color will be used as the accent color throughout your public profile.

RegisterConfirm.title: Confirm Registration
RegisterConfirm.description: You will start with {elo} Elo points. Do you want to continue?

EditGame.title: Modify Game
EditGame.description: Update the information and images of this platform.

ApproveGame.title: Confirm Approval
ApproveGame.description: Are you sure you want to approve {gameName}? It will be visible to all users immediately.

AddLeague.title: Add League
AddLeague.description: Fill in the details for the new event or competition.

slug.label: Identifier
slug.tooltip: Personalizes the URL for this league (e.g., /events/pro-league).
slug.taken: This identifier is already in use for this game.

allowDraw.label: Allow Draw
allowDraw.tooltip: Specify if draws are possible in this game's business rules.

kFactor.label: K-Factor
kFactor.tooltip: Determines how much the league changes after a match. Higher values make it more volatile.

scoreRelevance.label: Score Relevance
scoreRelevance.tooltip: Determines how much the final score difference influences the rating change. Higher values grant more bonuses for crushing victories.

inactivityDecay.label: Inactivity decay (daily)
inactivityDecay.tooltip: Points lost for each day of inactivity.

inactivityThreshold.label: Hours until inactivity
inactivityThreshold.tooltip: Time without matches before decay starts.

inactivityFloor.label: Decay Floor
inactivityFloor.tooltip: Minimum rating a player can reach via inactivity decay.

elo.title: Elo System
elo.description: Players gain points by winning and lose by losing. The exact amount is calculated based on the skill gap between opponents (Win Probability).
elo.relevance_1: Win margin is ignored; only the final result matters.
elo.relevance_2: Win margin has low impact on the final calculation.
elo.relevance_3: Win margin has moderate impact on performance.
elo.relevance_4: Win margin is highly relevant for point gains.
elo.relevance_5: Win margin is the primary factor; crushing victories grant massive bonuses.
elo.match_impact: Results in this league typically move ratings by around {kFactor} pts.
elo.decay: Inactive players lose {amount} points daily after {window} without playing (Floor: {floor}).

points.title: Points System
points.description: A fixed amount of points is awarded for each match outcome.

gameSelect.label: Choose the Game
gameSelect.placeholder: Select or type the game name...
gameSelect.newGameWarning: This game does not exist yet and will be created automatically.
gameSelect.newGameInstructions: Make absolutely sure the game doesn't exist before proceeding.

confirm.title: Confirm Creation
confirm.description: Do you want to create this league with the current settings?

AddPlayer.title: Add Player
AddPlayer.description: Create or link a player to this game.

link.label: Link to User
link.selectedDesc: Nationality and history will be synced with this profile.

AddPlayer.info: If you pick and link an Ares user, we will use the nationality (flag) defined in their global profile.
AddPlayer.successExisting: The user already has a registration for this game. The new username has been attached to the existing player.

EditLeague.title: Modify League
EditLeague.description: Update information for this league category.

slug.label: League Link
slug.description: Personalizes the URL for this league (e.g., /events/blitz).

AddPlayerToLeague.title: Register Player
AddPlayerToLeague.description: Add an existing or new player to this league.

search.notFound: This nick was not found for this game.

createPlayer.warning: Do you want to create a new player record with this nick?

NotFound.title: This battle doesn't exist
NotFound.description: The battlefield you're looking for was deactivated, never existed, or was deleted from the server.
